rulings.Case Title: BETTY L. DAVIS VS. CARLSON YEE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, May 18, 2018, Line 4. DEFENDANTS CARLSON YEE, SHIRLEY LI'S DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT. Sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege facts (not conclusions) showing that Plaintiff may do equity as required by Fleming v. Kagan (1961) 189 Cal.App.2d 791. For example, state facts showing that Plaintiff qualified for a mortgage and/or reverse mortgage; there is sufficient equity in the property; Plaintiff has sufficient income to service the mortgage, etc. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION , AS TRUSTEE, VS. LINDA CATRON ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reconsideration Of April 9, 2018, Order Denying Claim Of Right And Proof Of Service
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, May 18, 2018, Line 7. DEFENDANTS LINDA CATRON, MOHAMMAD KHAN'S Motion For Reconsideration Of April 9, 2018, Order Denying Claim Of Right. DENIED. First defendant does not meet the requirements of CCP 1008. There are no new facts, law or circumstances that were not or could not have been addressed at the hearing for claim of right to possession. The writ of execution obtained by 2614 Sacramento Street LLC was issued more than a month before the hearing; the challenged language in April 9, 2018 is mandated by CCP 1174.3(g); all issues pertaining to the writ should have and could have been addressed at the original hearing. Second, why acknowledging that 2614 Sacramento Street LLC could have become an assignee of record by "any other means" per CCP 673(d) defendant only argues that 2614 Sacramento Street LLC is not an assignee of record per CCP 673(a) and fails to address what "any other means" are and why 2614 Sacramento Street LLC failed to become and assignee of record by those means. Finally, filing of the Acknowledgment of Assignment of Judgment moots the issue. Acknowledgment is executed by an agent of judgment creditor's attorney in fact, and Defendant fails to cite any authority for the proposition that such execution is improper. =(501/REQ)
